# Introduction to OpenAI Agents SDK

Welcome to the **OpenAI Agents SDK Tutorial**! This guide is designed to help you build resilient and capable multi-agent systems using the newly announced OpenAI Agents Python SDK.

## What is the Agents SDK?

The OpenAI Agents SDK handles the complexity of LLM integrations. It abstracts away much of the underlying orchestration to give you clean building blocks:

- **Agents:** Intelligent entities that use language models.
- **Tools:** Functions that Agents can call to interact with the outside world.
- **Guardrails:** Safety and operational boundaries.
- **Context Management:** Tracking conversational state across turns.
- **Handoffs:** Fluid transfers of responsibilities from one specialized agent to another.
- **MCP:** Standardized integrations through the Model Context Protocol.

## Project Structure

Throughout this tutorial, we will build up the concepts one by one. Our final goal is to integrate everything into a beautiful Streamlit Application.

Navigate to the next chapter to begin defining your first Agent!
